name: workspace
summary: Manage agent workspace runtime/data paths and namespace directories

commands.name: paths
commands.summary: List standard workspace roots such as tmp, var, logs, cache, config, data, downloads, and backups

args.name: --json
args.summary: Emit JSON output

commands.name: path
commands.summary: Resolve a standard path for a root/domain/name tuple

args.name: root
args.summary: One of tmp, var, logs, cache, config, data, downloads, backups, tools, models

args.name: domain
args.summary: One of mycli, projects, skills, agents, shared

args.name: name
args.summary: Package path, project id, skill name, agent name, or shared namespace

commands.name: inspect
commands.summary: Show all scoped runtime/data paths for a domain/name tuple

args.name: domain
args.summary: One of mycli, projects, skills, agents, shared

args.name: name
args.summary: Package path, project id, skill name, agent name, or shared namespace

args.name: --json
args.summary: Emit JSON output

commands.name: config-path
commands.summary: Print the workspace-config.json path for a domain/name tuple

args.name: domain
args.summary: One of mycli, projects, skills, agents, shared

args.name: name
args.summary: Package path, project id, skill name, agent name, or shared namespace

commands.name: config
commands.summary: Ensure and print the workspace-config.json path or JSON content for a domain/name tuple

args.name: domain
args.summary: One of mycli, projects, skills, agents, shared

args.name: name
args.summary: Package path, project id, skill name, agent name, or shared namespace

args.name: --json
args.summary: Emit workspace-config JSON content

commands.name: ensure
commands.summary: Create standard workspace roots and namespace directories, or scoped directories for a domain/name tuple

args.name: domain
args.summary: Optional domain: mycli, projects, skills, agents, shared

args.name: name
args.summary: Optional package path, project id, skill name, agent name, or shared namespace

args.name: --json
args.summary: Emit JSON output

commands.name: ensure-package
commands.summary: Create standard runtime/data directories for a mycli package path

args.name: packagePath
args.summary: mycli package path, for example github or channels/QQ

args.name: --json
args.summary: Emit JSON output

commands.name: ensure-project
commands.summary: Create standard runtime/data directories for a project id or project path

args.name: project
args.summary: Project id or path under D:\agent_workspace\projects

args.name: --json
args.summary: Emit JSON output

commands.name: ensure-skill
commands.summary: Create standard runtime/data directories for a skill name, skill directory, or SKILL.md path

args.name: skill
args.summary: Skill name, skill directory, or SKILL.md path

args.name: --json
args.summary: Emit JSON output
